race.comment: Tricky race to assess with a few of these facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade OSCAR (2) just missed the placings in town on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Jockey Cartwright sticks in the stirrups and can improve enough to take this out. LADY MILAN (9) resumes here but the form she showed in her first campaign was good enough to warrant consideration in a race like this. Respect the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. TORQUE TOO EASY (13) was well found when at the races for the first time but just ran into one better on that occasion. In the mix. KICKSTART (8) is a former NSW galloper having his first run for the new stable and any market confidence must be noted. REVANTAS (7) best of the rest while fresh.
